parsed_output: To solve this problem, we need to identify the items that are not domestic (i.e., False in the "domestic" column) and are large in size (i.e., > 100kg).
From the given data, we can see that the items that meet the conditions are:
Shark: type: fish, domestic: False, size: large
Crocodile: type: reptile, domestic: False, size: large
Whale: type: mammal, domestic: False, size: large
We will return the names of these items as a JSON array.
